name: Nick Scali Limited
analysis: NCK has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$16.1900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$16.2700, stop A$13.4937, target A$19.0629 (1.01:1) — then trail it.
